posts.author: mikaoffillout (Mika)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I’m Mika, and I’m part of the Fillout team.

We’re thrilled to announce that you can now update existing items in your Monday board with no-code forms. Our forms also pre-fill fields with data from your Monday columns.

Other things you can do with Fillout + Monday:

Use logic to create forms that adapt to respondent input
Add validation to avoid submission of invalid or incomplete responses
Embed your form anywhere or share as a QR code

More functionalities here.

Our Free tier lets you receive up to 1,000 submissions per month.

Feel free to let me know if you have any questions!

posts.author: adyani (Alanna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

We build a fillout form connected to a Monday board to track incoming orders from clients. The form has quite a bit of conditional logic built in, which was all straightforward to set up. However, we had to change the names of the labels in a Monday column, and it completely threw off all references to that item. I figured it would have automatically re-mapped, but it did not. And as a result we had to re-set all the calculations and logic. Did we do something backwards? Should we have just updated the label and re-synced the Monday connection, and SHOULD it have worked to automatically re-map everything?
